betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Unsaturated Hydrocarbons§f

§aA versatile gaseous feedstock — the foundation of rubber, PVC, perfluoromethyl, and C-4 production!§f

Unsaturated Hydrocarbons are a flammable gas produced alongside Aromatic Hydrocarbons when refining §bHot Cracked Oil§f in the §bOil Refinery§f. Every §e1,000mB§f of hot cracked oil yields §e150mB§f. With §e3.66 MTU§f per bucket, it also makes an excellent gaseous fuel.

§6Production§f:
§b• Oil Refinery§f (Hot Cracked Oil or Desulfurized variants): §e150mB§f per §e1,000mB§f.
§b• Oil Refinery§f (Desulfurized Hot Crude Oil): §e150mB§f per §e1,000mB§f.
§b• Catalytic Cracking Tower§f (Reformate): §e100mB§f → §e40mB§f Unsaturated HC + §e60mB§f Reformate Gas.
§b• Catalytic Reformer§f (Petroleum Gas): §e1,000mB§f → §e850mB§f Unsaturated HC + §e100mB§f Reformate Gas + §e50mB§f LH.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Rubber Bar§f (Chemical Plant): §e500mB§f + Sulfur → §e1×§f Rubber.
§b• PVC Bar§f (Chemical Plant): §e250mB§f + §e250mB§f Chlorine Gas + Cadmium Powder → §e2×§f PVC.
§b• Perfluoromethyl§f (Chemical Plant): §e500mB§f + §e1,000mB§f Petroleum Gas + Fluorite → §e1,000mB§f.
§b• C-4§f (Chemical Plant): §e500mB§f + Niter → §e1×§f Composition C-4 Bar.
§b• Engine Lubricant§f (Industrial Mixer): §e500mB§f + §e500mB§f Heating Oil → §e1,000mB§f.
§b• Phosgene§f (Industrial Mixer): §e500mB§f + §e500mB§f Chlorine Gas → §e1,000mB§f.

§eTip§f: Unsaturated Hydrocarbons are the primary chemical gateway to §brubber§f and §bPVC§f, two materials essential for conveyor belts, pneumatic tubes, and the ZIRNOX reactor. Always keep a stock flowing from your cracked oil refinery!
